page: Microsoft Azure B2ms is a burstable virtual machine belonging to the BS family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor operating at 2.6 GHz. The configuration includes 2 physical cores with 1 thread per core, providing 2 vCPUs. It is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core, and includes 16 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability.

Benchmark data indicates that the B2ms instance operates primarily in the lower performance tiers. In stress-ng CPU tests, both single-core and multi-core performance fall into the bottom 25% category. Memory bandwidth tests, including read-only small block and large block write operations, similarly rank in the bottom 25% and bottom 10% respectively. Geekbench multi-core and Passmark CPU scores are positioned in the bottom 10%, reflecting the constraints of the burstable CPU allocation model. However, the instance achieves an average rating in LLM text generation speed using a small 135M model, reaching 94.9 tokens per second.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the B2ms utilizes a burstable CPU credit model, making it a resource-dense option for workloads with fluctuating CPU demands. The primary tradeoff is the performance limitation when CPU credits are exhausted, as evidenced by the low multi-threaded decompression and database operation benchmarks. This server is designed for low-traffic web servers, small databases, development environments, and light background tasks that do not require continuous full CPU utilization.
description: Microsoft Azure B2ms is a burstable virtual machine from the BS family, configured with 2 vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor running at 2.6 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, it features 2 physical cores and 16 GB of local storage with Premium Storage support. Benchmark results place this instance mostly in the lower performance tiers, with stress-ng CPU performance, Geekbench multi-core scores, and memory bandwidth ranking in the bottom 10% to 25%. However, it achieves average performance in text generation for small LLM models. Due to its burstable CPU allocation, the B2ms offers a cost-efficient profile for workloads with variable CPU utilization. It is suitable for light database operations, development environments, and low-traffic web serving.
og_description: Microsoft Azure B2ms is a burstable virtual machine featuring 2 vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor, designed for cost-efficient, variable-demand workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure B2ms is a burstable virtual machine with 2 vCPUs, 8.0 GB RAM, and an Intel Xeon processor for light, variable workloads.
tagline: A burstable virtual machine with balanced memory and Intel Xeon processing for variable, low-intensity workloads requiring cost-efficient resource allocation.

Utilizes a burstable CPU allocation model for variable workloads
Includes 16 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Ranks in the bottom 25% for CPU and memory bandwidth benchmarks
